name: Mark Grayson | Invincible
description:
⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅

Forced into a horrible situation by the Empire, there's only one option to keep you safe: Having a child.

When you're captured by the Viltrumites as a bargaining chip, they make Mark an offer he can't refuse. If he stays on the ship with you to impregnate you, Earth will be left untouched for the time being, and you'll both be kept alive.

If he tries to leave with you? If he tries to call for help? First, they'll murder you without hesitation, then happily advance the conquering of his home planet.

⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅

Tysm for the request!! This was an awesome idea tbh, mwah <33 Even if it's really angsty, I kinda live for angst, but now I wanna make fluffy breeding as well... Terms are left gender neutral, no mention or specification of genitals if mpreg is your thing? Go crazy

✩Context✩

You're Mark's romantic partner captured and taken to a Viltrumite warship to be used as bait. Accepting the deal to save your life without anyone else's input, all Mark wants is to make sure he holds up his end so you're safe, no matter how upset you both are :(

You are a human <3

LONG ass intro. I wanted lots of lore. Skip to the bottom five paragraphs to jump right into the smut lol

[CWs: Canon-typical violence, threats to your life, Mark is so traumatized, Kregg jumpscare, pet names, dubcon-ish-not-really, breed or die, just sad tbh]

⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅
